usage: setAddStripeMode [-help] [-reset] [-allow_jog {none|padcore_ring|block_ring}] [-allow_nonpreferred_dir {none|blockring|corering|padring|stripe}] [-area {<lx ly ux uy> | <x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 ...>}] [-break_at {none|block_ring|selected_block|unassigned_bump|overlap_ringpin|outer_ring|outside_ringmacro|blocks_without_same_net}] [-color_balance {same_color|alternate_color|none}] [-continue_on_no_selection {true|false}] [-detailed_log {true|false}] [-domain_offset_from_core {true|false}] [-extend_to_closest_target {ring|stripe|same_dir_stripe|area_boundary|none}] [-extend_to_first_ring {true|false}] [-ignore_block_check {true|false}] [-ignore_blockring_when_breaking {true|false}] [-ignore_DRC {true|false}] [-ignore_nondefault_domains {true|false}] [-inside_cell_allow_shift {true|false}] [-inside_cell_only {true|false}] [-keep_pitch_after_snap {true|false}] [-max_extension_distance <value>] [-max_via_size {shape width% height% target_penetration%}] [-merge_with_all_layers {true|false}] [-mesh_via {true|false}] [-offset_from_core {true|false}] [-optimize_stripe_for_routing_track {shift|none}] [-orthogonal_offset {edge1 offset_value ...}] [-orthogonal_only {true|false}] [-over_row_extension {true|false}] [-partial_set_thru_domain {true|false}] [-recommend_width <file_name>] [-remove_floating_stapling {true|false}] [-remove_floating_stripe_over_block {true|false}] [-remove_stripe_under_ring {true|false}] [-route_over_rows_only {true|false}] [-rows_without_stripes_only {true|false}] [-same_sized_stack_vias {true|false}] [-skip_via_on_pin {pad|block|cover|standardcell|physicalpin}] [-skip_via_on_wire_shape {blockring|stripe|followpin|corewire|blockwire|iowire|padring|ring|fillwire|noshape}] [-split_wire_weight <integer_0_to_10>] [-split_wire_width <value>] [-stacked_via_bottom_layer <layerName>] [-stacked_via_top_layer <layerName>] [-stapling_extend_to_minimum_spacing {true|false}] [-stapling_nets_style {end_to_end|side_to_side|side_to_side_full_nets}] [-stapling_shift {true|false}] [-stop_at_closest_target {none|block_ring|core_ring|stripe}] [-stop_at_last_wire_for_area {none|block_ring|core_ring|pad_ring|stripe}] [-trim_antenna_max_distance <value>] [-trim_stripe {none|design_boundary|core_boundary}] [-use_exact_spacing {true|false}] [-use_point2point_router {true|false}] [-use_stripe_width {true|false}] [-via_using_exact_crossover_size {true|false}] [-respect_routes {none||fixed||fixed_and_clock||all} ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -allow_jog
options.description: {none|padcore_ring|block_ring} Specifies the allowed jog type.

options.name: -allow_nonpreferred_dir
options.description: {none|blockring|corering|padring|stripe} Specifies whether to allow non-preferred direction to jog to target

options.name: -area
options.description: {<lx ly ux uy> | <x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 ...>} Specify the rectangular areas or rectilinear areas or a mix of them, the correct value should be {<lx ly ux uy> | <x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 ...>}

options.name: -break_at
options.description: {none|block_ring|selected_block|unassigned_bump|overlap_ringpin|outer_ring|outside_ringmacro|blocks_without_same_net} Specifies the stripe break point.

options.name: -color_balance
options.description: {same_color|alternate_color|none} same_color would correspond to interlace with groups and alternate_color would correspond to interlace within group

options.name: -continue_on_no_selection
options.description: Specifies whether to continue w/o selection

options.name: -detailed_log
options.description: Specifies whether to output detailed log file addStripe.log

options.name: -domain_offset_from_core
options.description: Specifies whether to use global offset for power domain stripes

options.name: -extend_to_closest_target
options.description: {ring|stripe|same_dir_stripe|area_boundary|none} Specifies the stripe to specified target

options.name: -extend_to_first_ring
options.description: Specifies whether to extend stripe antennas to closest ring

options.name: -ignore_block_check
options.description: Specifies whether to ignore block check

options.name: -ignore_blockring_when_breaking
options.description: {true|false} Specifies whether to break stripe outside block

options.name: -ignore_DRC
options.description: Specifies whether to ignore DRC check during stripe generation, it is always used for prototype flow

options.name: -ignore_nondefault_domains
options.description: Specifies whether to break at non-default domain

options.name: -inside_cell_allow_shift
options.description: Specifies to allow the created pillar inside cell can be shifted when meeting DRC

options.name: -inside_cell_only
options.description: Specifies whether to generate stripes only inside selected or specified cell

options.name: -max_extension_distance
options.description: Specifies maximum extension distance(default=max integer) when -extend_to_closest_target is specified.

options.name: -max_via_size
options.description: {shape width% height% target_penetration%} the maximum size of a crossover via, the correct value should be {shape width% height% target_penetration%}

options.name: -merge_with_all_layers
options.description: Specifies whether to merge a stripe on all layers

options.name: -mesh_via
options.description: use mesh via to reduce memory

options.name: -offset_from_core
options.description: Specifies whether to offset first or last stripe from the core area

options.name: -optimize_stripe_for_routing_track
options.description: {shift|none} move stripe location to preserve routing resource

options.name: -orthogonal_offset
options.description: {edge1 offset_value ...} Specifies the offsets for edges orthogonally, the correct value should be {[{edge1 orthogonal_offset1} {edge2 edge3 orthogonal_offset2} {edge4 edge5 ... orthogonal_offset3} ...] | [all orthogonal_offset]}

options.name: -orthogonal_only
options.description: vias connect to orthogonal targets only

options.name: -over_row_extension
options.description: Specifies whether to extend the stripe to cover followpin at the row end

options.name: -partial_set_thru_domain
options.description: Specifies whether to go over power domain if domain contains the specified net

options.name: -recommend_width
options.description: Specify the values of recommended width in the file name

options.name: -remove_floating_stapling
options.description: remove floating stapling stripe if there is no via connection

options.name: -remove_floating_stripe_over_block
options.description: {true|false} Specifies whether to remove stripe fragments start and end inside same block or ring macro

options.name: -remove_stripe_under_ring
options.description: Specifies whether to remove those segments under rings.

options.name: -respect_routes
options.description: {none|||fixed|||fixed_and_clock|||all} Specifies whether to honor pre-existing routes check during stripe generation

options.name: -route_over_rows_only
options.description: Specifies whether to route stripe over rows within the boundary

options.name: -rows_without_stripes_only
options.description: Specifies whether to generate stripes over rows w/o stripes

options.name: -same_sized_stack_vias
options.description: generate same-sized stacked vias

options.name: -skip_via_on_pin
options.description: {pad|block|cover|standardcell|physicalpin} prevent vias from being generated on the specified type of pins

options.name: -skip_via_on_wire_shape
options.description: {blockring|stripe|followpin|corewire|blockwire|iowire|padring|ring|fillwire|noshape} prevent vias from being generated on the specified wire shapes

options.name: -spacing_from_block
options.description: Specifies the spacing from block

options.name: -spacing_type
options.description: {edge_to_edge|center_to_center} Specify the type of intra spacing for addStripe -spacing

options.name: -split_long_via
options.description: {threshold step offset length} Split vias longer than <threshold> into smaller vias with specified <step> and bottom/left end <offset> and vertical/horizontal <length>, the correct value should be {threshold step offset length}

options.name: -split_vias
options.description: create multiple partial vias

options.name: -split_wire_spacing
options.description: Specifies the spacing between each split wire

options.name: -split_wire_weight
options.description: Deletes fewest IO wires to accommodate approximately n of 10 split stripe wires

options.name: -split_wire_width
options.description: Specifies the width of each split wire

options.name: -stacked_via_bottom_layer
options.description: lef layer name

options.name: -stacked_via_top_layer
options.description: lef layer name

options.name: -stapling_extend_to_minimum_spacing
options.description: {true|false} Specified to automatically extend the adjacent stapling as long as enough to satisfy the end-to-end minimum spacing with DRC free

options.name: -stapling_nets_style
options.description: {end_to_end|side_to_side|side_to_side_full_nets} Specify the stapling style if multiple nets are specified

options.name: -stapling_shift
options.description: shift stapling stripe to avoid the drc automatically

options.name: -stop_at_closest_target
options.description: {none|block_ring|core_ring|stripe} Specifies the stripe to specified target when over_pins is enabled.

options.name: -stop_at_last_wire_for_area
options.description: {true|false} Specifies whether to trim back stripe antennas to the closest wire or pin of the same net

options.name: -stripe_min_length
options.description: Specifies the minimum stripe length

options.name: -stripe_min_width
options.description: Specifies the min width of remaining stripe after being trimmed

options.name: -switch_cellname
options.description: Specifies the switch cells to be treated as rings

options.name: -switch_layer_overlap_length
options.description: Specifies the overlap distance used for the via between a stripe layer and the layer being switched to

options.name: -trim_antenna_back_to_shape
options.description: {none|block_ring|core_ring|pad_ring|stripe} Specifies the distance between the end of antenna and blocked target

options.name: -trim_antenna_max_distance
options.description: Specifies the distance between the end of antenna and blocked target

options.name: -trim_stripe
options.description: {none|design_boundary|core_boundary} Specifies if stripe is trimmed by the specified shape.

options.name: -use_exact_spacing
options.description: Specifies whether to use exact spacing

options.name: -use_point2point_router
options.description: Specifies whether to use exact spacing

options.name: -use_stripe_width
options.description: Specifies whether to use stripe width

options.name: -via_using_exact_crossover_size
options.description: {true|false} generate partial vias of the exact crossover size
